name: minichess-3x6
description: A playable engine for a 3x6 bishops-and-queens chess variant: iterative-deepening alpha-beta search backed by an exact endgame tablebase, with a web UI.

scripts.test: node engine.test.js && node tablebase.test.js && node --max-old-space-size=2048 search.test.js && node --max-old-space-size=2048 dtw.test.js tb.K5.bin 5 && node --max-old-space-size=2048 dtw-forceplay.test.js tb.K5.bin 5
